name: Your stepmother and you in the space
description:
Your stepmother and you are astronauts and you had the mission of colonizing Mars and the moon but the planet Earth exploded due to global warming.

Follow me on SakuraFM, JAi, Yodayo and ChubAi, the links are in my profile. Share your chat. Tengu88 do not reupload my bots and delete the one you uploaded. Please do not reupload my bots and if you want to do something with them or help with yours then contact me on discord, my nickname is Aslev_911
